body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200221-direct?refcode=em200221-direct&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I'll be direct: I am reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. **[You can do so right here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200221-direct?refcode=em200221-direct&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")**

My hope is that you'll give me the chance to explain why your donation matters so much today.

Donald Trump and the Republican National Committee raised over $60 million in a single month. They now have well over $200 million cash on hand.

Over the next few months, they will flood their massive amount of money into states like Minnesota in an effort to drown out Democrats like me. We need to be prepared to respond as soon as that happens.

As we close in on our end-of-month fundraising deadline in just a few days, I'm counting on your help to show everyone -- from McConnell's right-wing donor network to our GOP opponent -- that our scrappy grassroots team has what it takes to give the Republicans trying to defeat us a real run for their money.

After this deadline, I will receive an update on the amount of money we have raised and the number of people who have contributed so far this quarter. I hope to see your name on there.

**So, I'm asking: Will you chip in whatever is meaningful to you right now? Anything you can give before the end-of-month deadline will make a huge difference.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200221-direct?refcode=em200221-direct&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

subject: Your name cemented in HISTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body: Peter, The oath of office I took three years ago was an oath of allegiance to all Americans. >From that day forward, our Nation has had a President who puts America FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People. I promised you that I would Make America Great Again, which is happening, and now, I'm promising you that I will KEEP AMERICA GREAT. But, I can't do it without you. America can't keep WINNING without you. You've always been one of my most loyal supporters, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive. This election will be remembered as the most important election of our lifetime, so I've decided to dedicate a wall at our office for a select group of donors who choose to step up at this critical time. I want to give you EARLY ACCESS to have your name engraved and go down in history on the Official 2020 Trump Donor Wall. Space is extremely limited, so act fast! Please contribute $42 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to be one of the FIRST donors to have their name permanently engraved on the Official 2020 Trump Donor Wall. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448861:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r CONTRIBUTE $250 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448862:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r CONTRIBUTE $100 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448863:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r CONTRIBUTE $50 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448864:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r CONTRIBUTE $42 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448861:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54448865:s_nQqfvZN:m:3:1155937413:32A90018795BD99549D7C151C0745FE3:r I want you to be a part of history with me, Peter. I want to see your name up on that wall every time I stop by the office, and I want to see your name up there on Election Night when WE WIN BIG. The 2020 Democrats don't care about Patriots like you. They only care about their MEGA HOLLYWOOD DONORS and the ELITES who live on the COAST that can fund their dirty campaigns. But, not me. Not YOUR President. I'm relying on everyday Americans, like YOU, to help fuel our movement. name: Deborah Aquino
subject: Help Adem get on the ballot -- volunteer to collect petition signatures today!
body:
Peter,

Hi there -- my name is Deborah, and I’m a volunteer coordinator with Adem’s campaign. I just wanted to send around a brief message letting all of his supporters know that in a few days, we’ll be starting our petitioning process!

In order to get on the primary ballot in June, our team needs to collect a certain amount of signatures from registered voters in our district, and it’s important that we’re able to hit the ground running. If you’re interested in joining us, will you sign up to volunteer today? https://www.mobilize.us/adem2020/event/225101/

I know it might seem early in the campaign, but speaking from experience, this will be a defining moment for Adem's race. That's because if we aren't able to collect enough signatures in time, we won't make the ballot at all -- and not being on the ballot means no chance for us to make real progress in our communities. I know that you don't want to see Adem fall short, and one of the best ways to make an impact right now is by bringing your enthusiasm and energy directly to the voters! So don’t wait to get involved -- before petitioning starts on February 25th, become a volunteer today! https://www.mobilize.us/adem2020/event/225101/

Best,
Deborah Aquino

CLICK HERE TO VOLUNTEER https://www.mobilize.us/adem2020/event/225101/

| | **** | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15292983/161265439/664205141?refcode=em022220&refcode2=8e256367-8c55-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI1NjM2Ny04YzU1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVYQdIYOS5xE6jZigQSmuHgpQi83B4F_erZED5XurmQ=)** Friend,

I'd like to share with you a short story. It's about a restaurant called Paschal's in Atlanta. If you will give me a moment to explain, it will all make sense.

You see, in Atlanta in the 1960s, on the street that later became Martin Luther King Drive, Paschal's wasn't just a restaurant. It was one of the only places where all people – black and white, young and old, gay and straight – could sit together. While our brothers and sisters in the movement were putting their bodies on the line to desegregate lunch counters across the South, Paschal's "Colored Only" business and liquor licenses did not apply because they let anybody – black or white or brown – walk through their doors and share a table.

Paschal's became our home, our office, and our headquarters for the Civil Rights Movement. It's where we went to bring poor people together, no matter their ethnicity, to organize for justice.

So it was a great honor to join Teresa and her campaign at Paschal's this week, along with many of the wonderful women in the movement who helped me with my campaigns. I can only express to you the hopefulness that filled me seeing so many of us come together and to feel the extraordinary energy of this campaign for the United States Senate in Georgia.

We need somebody that's going to pull us together. And talking to people in our movement across Georgia, I know Teresa is the one who's ready to lift us up a little higher. We don't know exactly where that is yet, and we don't have to predict it. And the reason why is this:

To quote Reverend Ralph Abernathy, "I don't know what the future holds, and I really don't care, cause I know who holds the future." And when we trust our future to a wise, wonderful, dedicated woman like Teresa, we're in good hands because we're in God's hands.

Friends, we have the power to win this election and lift each other up a little higher. **I am honored to announce the endorsement of the Houston Chronicle!**

Last election, the Chronicle endorsed my campaign over long-time Republican incumbent, Michael McCaul, in the general election and they are now supporting me once again: _"His efforts in 2018, a race he lost by 4 percentage points to the powerful incumbent, convinced Democrats that the district was within grasp. clean_body: Peter, I am honored to announce the endorsement of the Houston Chronicle! Last election, the Chronicle endorsed my campaign over long-time Republican incumbent, Michael McCaul, in the general election and they are now supporting me once again: "His efforts in 2018, a race he lost by 4 percentage points to the powerful incumbent, convinced Democrats that the district was within grasp. He formed that challenge on a grassroots appeal that built upon his record of service as a teacher and assistant city attorney in Austin, where he led the charge in the suit against Texas’s anti-immigrant SB 4 law. During his campaign, he succeeded in protecting the voting rights of students at the historically black Prairie View A &M University." "Siegel quit his job last year to bring that fight full-time, dedicating himself to knocking on doors to help Democrats get elected, mobilizing against the confirmation of David Whitley as secretary of state over his botched voter purge and suing the state over changes to mobile voting. That willingness to show up and put in the time has gained him the endorsement of local Democratic groups, including the Harris County Tejano Democrats and the Black Austin Democrats, as well as youth-oriented groups such as Jolt Action and Sunrise ATX." = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

| Derek, Next Saturday night [join the Sullivan County Republican Committee as they kickoff the 2020 election cycle with special guest speaker Hon. Kelly Ayotte!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzYxNTU1Mjc4NDgyMzgwNTMyJmM9bTVwMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjE3Njc3OTAmZD16OW01aDd4.gWxw2x1rT6lIKJ4CnvqY7SOFiqfrdVfDChW9hF6Snzg)
## About this Event
The Sullivan County Republican Committee invites you to "LEAP INTO VICTORY"! Please join us for a special kickoff dinner to the 2020 election cycle. Guest speakers include Hon. Kelly Ayotte, former US Senator, House Republican Leader Rep. Dick Hinch, Deputy House Republican Leader Rep. Sherman Packard and many more. In keeping with the identity of Sullivan County, you’ll be treated to simple fare prepared well. Enjoy hot appetizers and socialize before the dinner that includes locally smoked meats, corn bread, and comfort foods provided by Kirby’s Q of Alstead, NH. subject: a very long email about the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15c/3284882656/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | We believe Joe should be the next Senator from Massachusetts. And he proved that on the debate stage this week. We want to detail exactly why we believe that in this email. **At the very end of this critical email, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign.** [**If you don't have time to read this entire email right now, consider making a contribution to sustain our debate momentum and come back later to read:**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15d/3284882656/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&recurring=1&amount=3") [Contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15d/3284882656/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&recurring=1&amount=3")
* * *
**Joe is a different kind of leader. That's what it boils down to.** On the debate stage this week, Joe was asked what he would do differently than the incumbent Senator he is challenging. It's a fair question in a Democratic primary - where there is going to be lots of agreement on the issues. But there is disagreement too. Senator Markey's Iraq War vote. Joe's commitment to keeping Super PACs out of the race. Joe's advocacy for structural reforms like ending the filibuster and the electoral college. **But the key difference in this race comes down to how each candidate sees the role of a U.S. Senator from Massachusetts. _Want to understand Joe? Look at how he approaches his current job._** **Joe is always back home****.** He holds open constituent office hours in all 34 cities and towns he represents every term. He shows up at ribbon-cuttings, community health centers, schools, fire stations, small businesses, democratic town committee meetings, and countless places in between. The minute he casts his last vote in DC for the weekend he is on a plane back--to his family, his home and the people he represents. _But he does more than just that._ **Joe writes - and passes - really good legislation.** From a bill to expand mental health care to low-income children and pregnant women, to legislation to make hearing aids more accessible to a major overhaul of our entire domestic manufacturing sector: Joe is known in the House as someone with the policy chops. Under President Obama AND President Trump--and largely under GOP leadership in the House--Joe has gotten things done. _But he does more than just that._ **Joe is a national voice for the Democratic Party.** From his headline-making attacks on Trump's attempts to repeal the ACA ("an act of mercy") to his striking critique of American capitalism, Joe has seized some of the most pressing fights of this generation, becoming a national figure for the Party's future. He was chosen by his colleagues to deliver the Democratic response to Donald Trump's first State of the Union. In the 24-7 news frenzy of the House impeachment vote, it was Joe's heartfelt letter to his two kids, read on the floor, that made national news. _But he's done more than just that._ **Joe hustles like hell to help Democrats win back the seats, representation, and power they need to actually pass progressive reforms.** Texas. West Virginia. Minnesota. Arizona. Joe was in over 20 states last cycle campaigning with new candidates for office and bringing new voters into the fight. He has spent countless hours and raised countless dollars supporting Democrats in key races up and down the ballot. Because he knows that the only way we get bills by Mitch McConnell is to take down Mitch McConnell. Joe thinks being a Senator is a multi-dimensional job. Every damn day. Writing a good bill is important but the job doesn't end there. Holding a press conference criticizing Donald Trump is important but the job doesn't end there. Writing a strongly-worded letter to the Administration is important but the job doesn't end there. **This is Joe's kind of leadership. It's different than the incumbent he's up against._And we think that's a good thing for Massachusetts._** **[We're all in. Are you? Help us win. Help us keep up our debate momentum.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15e/3284882656/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-19-whyjoe-p&recurring=1&amount=3") Make a contribution: ** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15f/3284882656/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd158/3284882656/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd159/3284882656/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd15a/3284882656/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-22-whyjoe&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---
Let's fight like hell. Just like Joe.
\- Team Kennedy.

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903e3/55b66746/22af9d42/80fd167/3284882656/VEsHBg/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Dean Browning
subject: ICYMI: I'm on the ballot!
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I am proud to say that I am officially the first Republican candidate to get on the ballot for this upcoming Primary Election.
Campaigns are not easy, but if we work together, we can fight through the primary and onto the general election where we can finally defeat Rep. Susan Wild.
My only job is to work for you. I want you to know that when I was a Lehigh County Commissioner, I worked overtime to ensure we had a vibrant economy where anyone willing to work hard could succeed. I want to take that work effort and bring it to the U.S. Congress.
I want Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to be the best place in American to live and raise a family.
I also want the United States to remain a beacon of hope and prosperity to those abroad. Please help me in this effort, Fellow Patriot.
A contribution of $100, $50, or even just $10 will go miles in supporting my campaign to be victorious in November 2020.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sBGWrH-q0boDa-Ywc91HynScYrQkaVWwKD4whXfw_MbqfZ0BlLwAq5eWWjCQ-q233y_P3E2Gqxk5aRh3KN55NqkfejxgeikhEL-TBajjM6WD9ViJyrVIFfNCFUT95Ec1UPsOsKYrYxAr58Zm1djhyn2VidkUmaVKn1BbVNRbGm8-Dr5a6s6KpQ==&c=_kdvCDXFj0w4C7OgoAnJxuo5KPhguHULjKg15AY1hbL2UOtMmOS8Wg==&ch=WC1O0-7XzyyKftWTZFuQNdiozOR5axI6HjtGftALP_ZajwPUC2EfYg==)
---
| The job of campaigning is not easy, and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself.
While some campaigns are running off elitist, corporate money, I fuel our campaign dollar by dollar from hard-working Americans who believe in a brighter future. That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district.
Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests. Please consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sBGWrH-q0boDa-Ywc91HynScYrQkaVWwKD4whXfw_MbqfZ0BlLwAq5eWWjCQ-q233y_P3E2Gqxk5aRh3KN55NqkfejxgeikhEL-TBajjM6WD9ViJyrVIFfNCFUT95Ec1UPsOsKYrYxAr58Zm1djhyn2VidkUmaVKn1BbVNRbGm8-Dr5a6s6KpQ==&c=_kdvCDXFj0w4C7OgoAnJxuo5KPhguHULjKg15AY1hbL2UOtMmOS8Wg==&ch=WC1O0-7XzyyKftWTZFuQNdiozOR5axI6HjtGftALP_ZajwPUC2EfYg==)
---
| Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Did you hear that I am the first candidate to qualify for the ballot? Together we can win this election and get Rep. Susan Wild out of Washington!
Can I count on you for a donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 to help my efforts?

name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team -

I'm proud to say California has made serious progress fighting climate change during my term as governor.
Unfortunately, at every turn, the Trump administration has attempted to block that progress. They have gutted environmental protections and denied climate science - all to line the pockets of Big Oil.
In one of his latest attacks on the planet, Trump rolled back federal greenhouse gas standards - and even revoked CA's authority to regulate auto emissions. If the president thinks he can stop the states from taking action on climate change, he is dead wrong.
We need to make sure that Democrats can stand up for our environment and curb the effects of climate change - we're even suing Trump to make sure he hears us loud and clear.**But if we 're going to prevent a climate catastrophe, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand.** The DGA's climate poll is closing at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and we still need your response:

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5e9/53d9897e/531b6334/1c89bec3/184387166/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-hbcu?refcode=20200222_f_1_nd__485__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
_Sen. Warner with Hampton University students in February 2020._
Derek --

This week, Mark was at Hampton and Norfolk State Universities visiting with some of Virginia's (and the world's!) future leaders in some of the schools he fought to support in the Senate.

In December, Mark backed the bipartisan FUTURE Act, restoring **$4 million in funding for historically black colleges and universities (HBCUs) in Virginia** -- and $255 million in funding nationwide. These schools are the foundation of America's higher education system, and serve millions of talented students across the country. Passing this legislation was an investment in our students. Our leaders.

The FUTURE Act was just one example of how members of the Senate can still work together on a bipartisan basis to do right by the people they serve. Mark has always been committed to finding honest and actionable solutions to help all Virginians. **That 's why it's crucial that we keep him in the Senate fighting for us.

| |

| | Friends and supporters!

I'd like you to know that I respect every candidate who has had the courage to put their name on the ballot to challenge Rep. Underwood in November. It takes courage and conviction to stand up for your beliefs and I commend my opponents for their courage. Unfortunately there’s been a lot of misleading information being spread by other candidates, and out of respect for you, the voters, I’d like to set the record straight. **Transparency and honesty has been my number one priority in my campaign. **So here goes!

**First,** I’m no politician. [_I am a true political outsider, small business owner, and man of God_](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=422c15902a&e=9b692867fa).

**Second,** I’m also a millennial candidate and I promise to serve you as a fresh face in Washington.

**Lastly, **[I strongly support President Donald Trump](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=f1ddd2d350&e=9b692867fa) and his economic and legislative agenda. My opponents have falsely claimed that I'm "part of the swamp in Springfield" or that I don't strongly support the President. These claims are purely **political lies** based in self-interest.

I hope this clears things up and [I'd be honored to have your support on March 17th. ](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=8b8014cfe6&e=9b692867fa)

Sincerely,

Jerry Evans

_The Texas Tribune_ says "MJ Hegar leads the Democratic pack for U.S. Senate," and it's clear that MJ is the best candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn in what _The Hill_ reports will be his "toughest race yet." **But we have to be honest: this rush of outside money is alarming.**

We don't put a lot of stock in polls, but it's clear these groups do -- and MJ **_terrifies_** them. She's a political outsider, combat veteran, and working mom -- the perfect candidate to take on Cornyn. They see this powerful grassroots team and our momentum, and they're scrambling to hold us down in the final days before the March 3rd primary.

**This definitely won 't be the last time we see outside money flooding into Texas trying to drown out MJ's message.** A super PAC supporting Sen. Cornyn has pledged to spend $25 million in Texas this election! That's why we need to be ready to fight back.

body:
We are already seeing the damage and impact of climate change around the world, and even here in Montana. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=39add0a984cd414ca025b2165c234f8a&_e=KXicwc1B0hy1B_7oZD32NFjRWM4PRVBeySYFIuztY_81_5YrGFdEjD9tKX7_kzyr5HeOG4SvxDddcrLBlcFE-BWfAudVhI58G9WFTJ8SR-4fOWFw2ApQ76PyJ_Sw3iGxSSXbvfywVb8HvLNuOYFGKXIMP26MHIQkoxqp-VccNC_f3m0plqVO6seHgwTj8t1zR8E8OPWExGiprg2o7bcTvSJc1iDN35acCSVCjphHX0IH2bHx9Xb6zTkOPY3TUSFdmkfARr7xrkLgoq4XXR31eN0GlL6HGE3kPtdmTsaJ-TLiR4EWXczdVYsqkubnab5b) We are already seeing the damage and impact of climate change around the world, and even here in Montana. After being hit by excessive rain and snow, Montana farmers’ crops and land were devastated. Governor Bullock has officially declared a state of natural disaster in 17 Montana counties. Disasters like this will only become more frequent and extreme the longer our leaders in Washington -- like Steve Daines -- fail to act on climate change. **To add insult to injury, Steve Daines voted against the bill to help these struggling farmers and ranchers with extreme changes in weather.** **[Add your name here to _DEMAND_ Washington take immediate action to combat climate change. We can’t afford to wait any longer.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=39add0a984cd414ca025b2165c234f8a&_e=KXicwc1B0hy1B_7oZD32NFjRWM4PRVBeySYFIuztY_81_5YrGFdEjD9tKX7_kzyr5HeOG4SvxDddcrLBlcFE-BWfAudVhI58G9WFTJ8SR-5pBa24TRRvTUtXNRcbY3bfhSGLpuK7JXQUv1ymInRbAKhTK3K-1kiDdCOSxlht9nQbVFOhGCwtUSKxPXkSmi4wdkX29gmviP9v-1QFY-ooB-fXkbgIV0O0SE-qcE8wlWS6-2VhiDpeGQink7nPO59kmiEUXjXNuf4Jtk2A_7QBLy_icMnAYYcTp-AV5wURxlX62UB5Edp0WvJotF4R5A3_)** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=39add0a984cd414ca025b2165c234f8a&_e=KXicwc1B0hy1B_7oZD32NFjRWM4PRVBeySYFIuztY_81_5YrGFdEjD9tKX7_kzyr5HeOG4SvxDddcrLBlcFE-BWfAudVhI58G9WFTJ8SR-7YQSRO6AY1JHN09uYzXuolnZr9CS6IyGE2Qjsrbe-_4NZrYUyF1FCHKwLHorzvnz-ZQ5dYO7OHUUXlkUSYWuJemUnWYuWud-7rc1Fg6zvXKsLXuHtKhaPKAaK53Az0IJg9t_OngDlYx86X1uMneF_Jb1RNENPVcr_LRe0Jx14076R0m9t8y-YmXfR69vSL37MFv7SCEwn5rl6eKFv69oNK) The global climate crisis is only getting worse by the day. We need leaders in Washington who take this threat seriously and will take immediate steps to ensure we leave a habitable planet for future generations. clean_body: We are already seeing the damage and impact of climate change around the world, and even here in Montana. | | | We are already seeing the damage and impact of climate change around the world, and even here in Montana. After being hit by excessive rain and snow, Montana farmers’ crops and land were devastated. Governor Bullock has officially declared a state of natural disaster in 17 Montana counties. Disasters like this will only become more frequent and extreme the longer our leaders in Washington -- like Steve Daines -- fail to act on climate change. To add insult to injury, Steve Daines voted against the bill to help these struggling farmers and ranchers with extreme changes in weather. The global climate crisis is only getting worse by the day. We need leaders in Washington who take this threat seriously and will take immediate steps to ensure we leave a habitable planet for future generations. Montana can’t afford leaders like Steve Daines who not only sit on their hands and fail to act but actively vote against helping offset the costs of these natural disasters. Thanks, Wilmot Collins for Montana Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

name: Progressive Majority
subject: [Signature needed] Demand Congress stand up to Trump to protect immigrants and refugees!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter \-- Donald Trump has made attacking immigrants the cornerstone of his presidency. He tried to implement an illegal Muslim ban during his first days in office. He suggested shooting immigrants in the legs to keep them from reaching the border. He demonizes refugees at his rallies and ratcheted up the cost of applying for asylum. And now he wants to punish immigrants and refugees for being poor. In a 5-4 partisan vote last month, the Supreme Court overturned a nationwide injunction and allowed Trump to implement his "public charge rule." The rule is designed to make it easier for the Trump administration to block low-income immigrants and immigrants of color from entering the country, and to block immigrants in the U.S. who've ever needed public assistance from becoming citizens. [**Congress has the power to step in and protect immigrants and refugees from the cruelty of the Trump administration, and we need to make sure they know where the people stand. If you stand with immigrants and refugees -- if you believe Trump is the antithesis of the American dream -- we need you to sign our petition and join tens of thousands of Democrats across the country who are saying enough is enough to Donald Trump.**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c4f/5360b1c8/2d4b1106/b071e14/1243131766/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectImmigrantsAndRefugees/?code=progressive-majority&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2FvxfRU2Tk") Thank you for everything you do for the cause, Progressive Majority | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c4f/5360b1c8/2d4b1106/b071e14/1243131766/VEsE/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectImmigrantsAndRefugees/?code=progressive-majority&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2FvxfRU2Tk")**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Our Choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We stand at a vital crossroads as a Nation. Either we can stick with the hard-work, determination and relentless optimism that made America the greatest nation in the world or we choose to abandon those principles and embrace a socialist system that will destroy everything we have built.

**Tomorrow, that choice is on full display.**

At 1pm, Bernie Sanders will be rallying the radical left at the University of Houston. He’ll discuss his plans to eliminate employer sponsored healthcare, pass open borders and, most importantly, destroy Houston’s energy economy as we know it.

We won’t stand for that.

At that exact same time, Senator Ted Cruz will be joining Michael Berry and me at the **Republic Country Club and BBQ** for a **GOTV Rally**. Senator Cruz needs allies in the House who will stand with him to protect the values that we hold dear. When Bernie and the socialist try to kill our energy jobs, I’ll stand with Senator Cruz to defend them.

**Make your choice clear by attending our GOTV Rally with Senator Cruz.**

Help stop socialism now and join us tomorrow at 1:00pm (doors open at 12:30) at the Republic Country Club. To RSVP, just email chris@wesleyfortexas.com.

We look forward to seeing you there and continuing the fight to defend our values, our energy jobs and our way of life.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=37cd2073502f4ecea36ebaed2182b373&_e=DSZHJ7s0OPAXI6FCqWlQzjjH9Uvzhj2zWg8vO0_usf9tA2r9W5qWGJrk86qr4LTATxRCmVcbzDYsnNnc-ol9XO1EoW98DJgjMrIn1PZUMG-JI3zINzJSAWEWUjXetkGzMgpp_xuYh69yMxWzv1Zu2t8EcB2MXfpQWakbPfQXz6t7hFfu3LGxbvCn0mXOtm9ESLzittzN_-gV_LaRQp21f8O_AncY-FIq7h2KD35ZZ88llo4Ri4zCImHtICthhstk7FTQrASX4kXgsPOKqqtHbJFMT2NAn_fHTkw2rob4nkE%3D)****

subject: What does this mean?

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200222-gears?refcode=em200222-gears&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I'm reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Anything you can contribute today is super important. Here's why:

More and more people are tuning into our race for the very first time and learning more about our odds in this election. So, it's imperative we reach them with our message and bring them on board.

But what does that mean exactly? It means keeping me on the campaign trail as much as possible to talk with Minnesotans from every corner of our state -- listening and learning about the issues that matter most to their communities.

It means building a grassroots organization that can withstand the flood of special interest cash from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's network of super PACs and wealthy donors.

It means reaching folks with TV and digital ads to make sure everyone, no matter which part of the state they live in, has the opportunity to hear our message.

Now look, everything I just said takes a heck of a lot of resources to turn into reality. And with the obscene amount of money the other side is raising, we can't afford to sit on our hands -- not for a second.

**So, I'm asking: Can you add a donation of $10 or whatever is meaningful to you to my re-election campaign today? Our end-of-month deadline is less than a week away and we need to start shifting into high gear.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200222-gears?refcode=em200222-gears&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
